745 GG0170P2_PCKNG_UP_OBJ_GOAL_CD GG0170P2_PCKNG_UP_OBJ_GOAL_CD GG0170P2 Picking Up Object Goal Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to bend/stoop from a standing position to pick up a small object, such as a spoon, from the floor by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not
